familyDesigns.recommendedHandlingStrategy: keep blocked; design visual watchdog batch gate
familyDesigns.requiredProof: visual-safe recovery, persisted backup, delayed apply review, rollback timer, and no reload unless separately proven
familyDesigns.requiredRecoveryBehavior: dead-man confirm-or-revert with persisted backup and display-independent restore report
familyDesigns.userFacingBlockedCopy: Blocked: display/render settings need a recovery path before the app can write them.

familyDesigns.recommendedHandlingStrategy: keep blocked; use shader advisory plus render watchdog proof

familyDesigns.requiredRecoveryBehavior: dead-man confirm-or-revert with persisted backup and display-independent restore report
familyDesigns.userFacingBlockedCopy: Blocked: display/render settings need a recovery path before the app can write them.

familyDesigns.recommendedHandlingStrategy: keep blocked; design display topology and rollback proof
familyDesigns.requiredProof: display topology snapshot, visible confirmation, out-of-band rollback path, and timeout restore
familyDesigns.requiredRecoveryBehavior: dead-man confirm-or-revert with persisted backup and display-independent restore report
familyDesigns.userFacingBlockedCopy: Blocked: monitor/output settings need a display recovery path before the app can write them.

familyDesigns.recommendedHandlingStrategy: keep blocked; use input-independent watchdog confirmation
familyDesigns.requiredProof: input-independent confirmation, keyboard/token fallback, pointer-independent recovery, and timeout restore
familyDesigns.requiredRecoveryBehavior: dead-man confirm-or-revert independent of pointer visibility, pointer focus, and normal mouse input
familyDesigns.userFacingBlockedCopy: Blocked: input settings need an input-safe recovery path before the app can write them.

familyDesigns.recommendedHandlingStrategy: keep blocked; validate paths without executing anything
familyDesigns.requiredProof: path existence/readability checks, no script execution during validation, and explicit user confirmation
familyDesigns.requiredRecoveryBehavior: persisted backup restore with reread verification and no Hyprland reload
familyDesigns.userFacingBlockedCopy: Blocked: script/path settings need extra review because the app must not execute scripts while checking them.
